positions.label: HQ in Lapland — supporting the Murmansk front
Arctic operations against the Murmansk railway and the convoys

summary: Luftflotte 5 covered Norway and the Arctic front, supporting the German 20th Mountain Army's drive on Murmansk and attacking the Allied convoys to the Soviet Union.
notes: Backbone command: placed (derived) behind the Arctic-front 20. Gebirgsarmee; the bulk of its strength sat in Norway, off the Eastern Front.
